goal: Fix Celtic Cross shuffle freeze (cards stuck at centre) + make Ask-a-Question board match Daily (card size + no empty gap)
done: (1) CELTIC FREEZE root cause via real-browser tracing: on shuffle the full board stayed at the collect state (opacity 0.8) while is-locked cleared = animateDealStack hit its empty-slots guard because the setupBoard closure slots array DIVERGES from the live DOM on the 40-card board. Fix: 'full' profile now uses animateFullDeal which queries the LIVE DOM, fades/slides cards IN at the grid (no centre gather), guaranteed setTimeout cleanup; render() 'full' does a quick fade-out then re-deals. daily+question keep animateDealStack. Verified real browser: post-shuffle 40 cards opacity 1, 0 at centre, no leftover transforms, unlocked. (2) QUESTION PARITY: card-slot uses daily's exact clamp (clamp(38px,calc((100dvh-384px)/6),64px); was 420/40px), and CTA row drops margin-top:auto (which left a big empty gap) so Reveal/Continue sits right below the board like daily. Headless-verified 390x844. Cache-bust 20260623a->20260623b; www synced.
fix: full board deals via live-DOM animateFullDeal (not divergent closure slots); question card-slot clamp + CTA margin aligned to daily.
verified: real-browser full.html shuffle: 40 cards opacity 1, 0 nearCentre, unlocked
headless question-draw 390: Reveal sits under the board (gap removed)
